8:["$","$L6",null,{"code":"# Semantic search\nresults = mem.recall(\"What programming language does Alice prefer?\")\n\n# Filtered search\nresults = mem.recall(\n  query=\"deadline\",\n  tags=[\"project-alpha\"],\n  since=\"2026-04-01\",\n)\n\n# Access a specific memory by ID\nmemory = mem.get(\"mem_abc123\")\n","language":"python"}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"4. Update and Delete"}]
